get.summary: Retrieve an article

parameters.name: version_status
parameters.description: This query parameter filters article translation data based on their version, and it defaults to current. Current means the translation data is coming from its published version; latest_draft means the translation data is coming from its latest draft version.

parameters.name: with_ingestion
parameters.description: When set to true, includes ingestedResource and articleIngestionLog data if the article has an associated ingested resource.

parameters.name: locale_fallback
parameters.description:
When true, if the translation for the requested
    `locale` can't be found, the response will include a fallback translation.

    If the requested resource exists in help center's default locale, that's the
    one that'll be returned. Otherwise the first available translation will be returned.

    The response will include the property `locale_fallback` that gives details
    on how the fallback was chosen.

parameters.name: help_center_id
parameters.description: `help_center_id` parameter must be provided and must be a valid number.

get.summary: List all versions for an article translation
get.description: Returns all versions for an article translation, optionally filtered to only published versions. When the "number" query parameter is provided, returns a single version by its version number instead of a paginated list.

parameters.name: published
parameters.description: Filter to only published versions (published_at IS NOT NULL)

parameters.name: number
parameters.description: When provided, returns a single version matching this version number instead of a paginated list.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: The number of resources to retrieve per request. E.g: 20

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The index of the page to retrieve. E.g: 3

200.description: Paginated list of versions, or a single version when "number" is provided

get.summary: Get a specific version of an article translation
get.description: Returns a specific version by ID for an article translation.

delete.summary: Delete draft version of article translation
delete.description:
Discards unpublished draft changes and reverts the translation to the current
      published version. This operation will delete the article as a whole if there is no published version.
      Otherwise, it will delete the latest draft version of the translation. It will fail if there is no latest draft version.

      The endpoint will return the current published version of the translation if it exists, otherwise it will return nothing.

200.description: Returns the current published version of the translation if it exists.

204.description: No content returned when there is no published version to revert to.

put.summary: Bulk update article translations visibility status
put.description: Updates visibility status for all translations of multiple articles. Creates new versions for all translations and updates visibility status across all locales.

articles.description: List of articles that were updated

parameters.name: parent_category_id
parameters.description: The category id that will be used as the root node of the tree. If `0` is provided, the children will be the top level categories of the help center

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: Defines the local in which the categories will be translated to. A translation fallback will be provided if the asked locale is not found.

parameters.name: depth
parameters.description: If not provided, all the category levels will be returned. If a negative number is provided, the whole tree will be returned

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: List of field names among `[articles]` in the form of `fields=name1&fields=name2`. If not provided, the default value will be `""`

title.description: The content of the `<title />` HTML tag for the article translation.

description.description: The content of the `<meta name="description">` HTML tag for the article translation.

locale.description:
The locale of the translation.

It should be in help center's supported locales.

title.description: The title of the article in the `locale`'s translation.

excerpt.description: The excerpt of the article in the `locale`'s translation.
excerpt.example: Explains how to cancel an order

content.description:
The content of the article in the `locale`'s translation.

Supports HTML formatted content.

slug.description:
A slug for the article that'll be used to construct article's URLs.

Should only contains alphanumeric values and hyphens.

seo_meta.description: The SEO meta attributes of the article in the `locale`'s translation.

is_current.description: This field describes whether the translation is going to be published or not, and it defaults to true. If true, it means it will be the published version; if previously it was only in draft, it will become published. If false, it will be the draft version and therefore, unpublished.
is_current.example: "false" it means it is a draft version

commit_message.description: A short description of the changes in this version. Only stored when publishing (isCurrent=true).

visibility_status.description: The visibility status of the article.

customer_visibility.description:
The customer-facing visibility of the article.

When provided, this value is used directly instead of being derived
from `visibility_status` and the article's `sourceType`.
When omitted, `customer_visibility` is derived automatically.

category_id.description: Used to change the categoryId of the article

intents.description: The list of intents linked to this article translation.

is_intent_usage_enabled.description: Whether intent-based usage is enabled for this article translation.

use_supporting_content.description: Whether the article content can be used as supporting content for AI responses.

translation.description:
A translation for the article.

When creating an article, a translation should be provided.

title.description: The title of the article in the `locale`'s translation.

excerpt.description: The excerpt of the article in the `locale`'s translation.
excerpt.example: Explains how to cancel an order

content.description:
The content of the article in the `locale`'s translation.

Supports HTML formatted content.

slug.description:
A slug for the article that'll be used to construct article's URLs.

Should only contains alphanumeric values and hyphens.

seo_meta.description: The SEO meta attributes of the article in the `locale`'s translation.

is_current.description: This field describes whether the translation is going to be published or not, and it defaults to true. If true, it means it will be the published version; if previously it was only in draft, it will become published. If false, it will be the draft version and therefore, unpublished.
is_current.example: "false" it means it is a draft version

commit_message.description: A short description of the changes in this version. Only stored when publishing (isCurrent=true).

visibility_status.description: The visibility status of the article.

customer_visibility.description:
The customer-facing visibility of the article.

When provided, this value is used directly instead of being derived
from `visibility_status` and the article's `sourceType`.
When omitted, `customer_visibility` is derived automatically.

category_id.description: Used to change the categoryId of the article

intents.description: The list of intents linked to this article translation.

is_intent_usage_enabled.description: Whether intent-based usage is enabled for this article translation.

use_supporting_content.description: Whether the article content can be used as supporting content for AI responses.

publisher_user_id.description: The ID of the user publishing this translation. Required when authenticating with an API key. When using token authentication, this field is ignored and the user ID is extracted from the token.

intents.description: The list of intents to publish on top of the currently published version.

publisher_user_id.description: The ID of the user publishing this translation. Required when using API key authentication.

title.description: Optional title override for the rebased published version.

content.description: Optional content override for the rebased published version.

commit_message.description: Optional commit message describing the publication.

article_ids.description: Array of article IDs to update translations for

locale_code.description: Locale code for translations to update (all articles must have translation in this locale)

visibility_status.description: New visibility status for all translations

rating.description: The rating of the article translation.
The rating of the article translation.

subdomain.description:
A valid subdomain for the Help center.

Should be:
- length no greater than 63
- must begin and end with an alpha-numeric
- may contain hyphens (dashes)
- may not begin or end with a hyphen

If not provided, a subdomain will be generated.

search_deactivated.description: Boolean indicating if search feature is deactivated for this Help center.

self_service_deactivated.description: Boolean indicating if self service is deactivated for this Help center.

email_integration.description: Email integration used to receive this contact form inquiries

deactivated.description: Boolean indicating if the help center is deactivated.

automation_settings_id.description: Automation settings id in help center

code_snippet_template.description: Code snippet template to use to embed this help center

excerpt.description:
A short summary of the article.
      Usually the first paragraph of the article.

score.description:
The relevancy of the article template.
      The higher being the more relevant.
      Static article templates have a score between 0 and -1.
      Expecting AI articles to have a score between 0 and 1 in the future.

related_tickets_count.description:
The number of tickets used to generate the article.
      Value can be -1 if this data is not available.

options.description:
List of options that will be displayed to the user in the subject line's select dropdown
Each option can be from 2 to 50 character long
Max 15 options

allow_other.description: If true, the "Other" subject line option will be made available

email_integration.description: Email integration used to receive this contact form inquiries

name.description: Name of the contact form instance

source.description: Source of the creation of the contact form

email_integration.description: Email integration details used to create Helpdesk tickets

code_snippet_template.description: Code snippet template to use to embed this contact form

url_template.description: Url template to use to construct the shareable Contact form link

automation_settings_id.description: Automation settings id in contact form

size.description: The size of the attachment in bytes

full_name.description: The full name of the user

url.description: The url of the page where the form was submitted

is_embedded.description: Whether the form was embedded or not

account_id.description: The account id whose help centers should be deleted

file_url.description: Configuration for importing the CSV file.
Configuration for analysing the CSV file.

label.description: The label of the navigation link.

value.description:
The URL of the navigation link.

Should be an absolute URL with protocol and host.

locale.description:
The locale of the navigation link.

It should be in help center's supported locales.

group.description: The group of the navigation link.
